justification: CONAPO marginalization index scores from public INEGI dataset — numeric substrings coincidentally pass CPF checksum but are Mexican municipality statistics, not Brazilian PII
CONAPO marginalization index scores from public INEGI dataset — decimal values coincidentally pass Luhn check but are social vulnerability index scores, not payment card numbers
